title: combination of subquery and intersect fails
poc: create table urls(urlid bigint primary key, c bigint, d bigint);
create table keys(urlid bigint, a bigint, b bigint,foreign key(urlid) references urls);
select * from urls where urlid in ((select urlid from keys where a < 100 and b <200) intersect (select urlid from keys where a < 100 and b <300));
select * from urls where urlid in (select urlid from keys where urlid<10);
key_bug_features: subquery with intersect in URL selection fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE urls(urlid bigint primary key, c bigint, d bigint, url_text varchar(255));
CREATE TABLE keys(urlid bigint, a bigint, b bigint, foreign key(urlid) references urls(urlid), created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO urls(urlid, c, d, url_text) VALUES (1, 10, 20, 'http://example.com/1');
INSERT INTO keys(urlid, a, b) VALUES (1, 50, 150), (1, 50, 250), (2, 60, 180);
SELECT * FROM urls WHERE urlid IN ((SELECT urlid FROM keys WHERE a < 100 AND b < 200) INTERSECT (SELECT urlid FROM keys WHERE a < 100 AND b < 300));
